title: [BTW Addon] Forgiving Campfire
description: A Better Than Wolves addon that makes the campfire’s overfuel mechanic more forgiving.
body:
# Forgiving Campfire Addon
A Better Than Wolves addon that makes the campfire’s overfuel mechanic more forgiving.

## Changes
The addon removes the mechanic from BTW CE 3.0 which locks campfires into burning with a large frame for a while after getting overfueled. This allows some room for error, and your cook isn't instantly doomed if you slightly overfuel your campfire. On the other hand, it now takes much less time for food to get burnt on a campfire, so you should still take good care not to overfuel your campfire too much. 

## Installation
You can install the addon by placing the release jar in the mods folder of a BTW CE 3.0 client or server.

## Copyright
The Forgiving Campfire Addon is available under the CC0 1.0 license, allowing you to do with it as you wish without considering my copyright.
